mapper.select: SELECT id, name, order_index, color FROM statuses ORDER BY order_index ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO statuses (name, order_index, color) VALUES (#{name}, #{orderIndex}, #{color})
mapper.select: SELECT s.name as status_name, COUNT(t.id) as count, s.color as color FROM statuses s LEFT JOIN tasks t ON t.status_id = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.color ORDER BY s.order_index ASC
